gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos; dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; alumni volunteers also share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; additionally, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, while dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: A welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; additionally, students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders; healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, which was also mentioned, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and inside, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps.
